---
title: "Key Penang Statistics"
pagetitle: Key Penang Statistics by Penang Institute
title-prefix: ""
description: |
  Key Penang Statistics is a set of dashboards that visualise key socioeconomic 
  data about Penang. Developed by Penang Institute's Socioeconomics & Statistics 
  Programme, it provides insights into Penang's cost of living, trade
  performance, gender landscape, graduate employability, economic trajectory, 
  income disparities, labour force statistics, state finance, and population trends 
  from official government sources. 
listing:
  - id: metrics
    contents: keyPenangMetrics/output/metrics_grid.yaml
    grid-columns: 5
    type: grid
  - id: penang-monthly
    contents: keyPenangMetrics/output/penang-monthly-stats.yaml
    date-format: "MMMM YYYY"
    type: grid
    page-size: 3
  - id: dashboards-econ
    contents: 
    - dashboards/econ/*.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "5"
  - id: dashboards-sector
    contents: 
    - dashboards/sector/*.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "5"
  - id: dashboards-social
    contents: 
    - dashboards/social/*.qmd
    type: grid
    grid-columns: 3
    image-height: "5"
title-block-banner: '#c3353c'
title-block-banner-color: 'white'
---

## Penang at a glance

:::: metrics
::: {#metrics}
:::
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## Dashboards 

#### Economic indicators

:::: dashboards
::: {#dashboards-econ}
:::
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Sector-specific

:::: dashboards
::: {#dashboards-sector}
:::
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

#### Social indicators

:::: dashboards
::: {#dashboards-social}
:::
::::

------------------------------------------------------------------------

## New in Penang Monthly

::: {#penang-monthly}
:::

```{=html}
<script>
  // Append "Data as of <period>" and "Updated <date>" footers to each
  // "Penang at a glance" card.
  //
  // Option A ("Data as of") comes from the card's .card-title (the data
  // period from metrics_grid.yaml).
  //
  // Option B ("Updated") comes from the last_updated field in
  // metrics_grid.json, written by the pipeline each time it runs.
  //
  // Both footers are appended inside .card-body so Bootstrap's flex layout
  // pushes them to the bottom of the card without overflow.
  (function addCardFooters() {
    function addDataAsOf(cards) {
      cards.forEach(function (card) {
        if (card.querySelector('.data-as-of')) return;
        var body = card.querySelector('.card-body') || card;
        var titleEl = body.querySelector('.card-title');
        var period = titleEl && titleEl.textContent.trim();
        if (!period) return;
        var el = document.createElement('div');
        el.className = 'data-as-of';
        el.textContent = 'Data as of ' + period;
        body.appendChild(el);
      });
    }

    function addUpdatedAt(cards, date) {
      cards.forEach(function (card) {
        if (card.querySelector('.updated-at')) return;
        var body = card.querySelector('.card-body') || card;
        var el = document.createElement('div');
        el.className = 'updated-at';
        el.textContent = 'Updated ' + date;
        body.appendChild(el);
      });
    }

    function run() {
      var cards = document.querySelectorAll('.metrics .card');
      addDataAsOf(cards);

      fetch('keyPenangMetrics/output/metrics_grid.json')
        .then(function (r) { return r.json(); })
        .then(function (data) {
          var updated = data[0] && data[0].last_updated;
          if (updated) addUpdatedAt(cards, updated);
        })
        .catch(function () { /* graceful: Option A still shows */ });
    }

    if (document.readyState === 'loading') {
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded', run);
    } else {
      run();
    }
  })();
</script>
```
